analysis_scope.question: Build a valuation-free disclosure-grounded thesis using 10-K, 10-Q, and 8-K only.

executive_summary.summary: Palantir's average revenue for the top twenty customers during the trailing twelve months ended September 30, 2025 was $83.0 million, which grew 38% from an average of $60.1 million in revenue. Palantir has built four principal software platforms, Palantir Gotham (“Gotham”), Palantir Foundry (“Foundry”), Palantir Apollo (“Apollo”), and its Artificial Intelligence Platform (“AIP”). On February 2, 2026, Palantir Technologies Inc. announced its financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year ended December 31, 2025, through a press release furnished as Exhibit 99.1.

final_investment_thesis.thesis: Verified disclosures show that on February 2, 2026, Palantir Technologies Inc. announced its financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year ended December 31, 2025, through a press release furnished as Exhibit 99.1 to an 8-K filing. Additional filing support shows Palantir's average revenue for the top twenty customers during the trailing twelve months ended September 30, 2025 was $83.0 million, which grew 38% from an average of $60.1 million in revenue from the top twenty customers during the trailing twelve months ended September 30, 2024, demonstrating its expanding relationships with existing customers. Further filings indicate that Palantir has built four principal software platforms, Palantir Gotham (“Gotham”), Palantir Foundry (“Foundry”), Palantir Apollo (“Apollo”), and its Artificial Intelligence Platform (“AIP”).
final_investment_thesis.uncertainty_statement: The conclusion remains uncertainty-aware because some signals are only partially supported or coverage is incomplete.
